title: Elation Health - Primary Care EHR with Billing Integration
problem: Primary care practices need EHR designed for their workflows with integrated billing, eligibility verification, and patient engagement.
solution: Primary care-focused EHR with integrated billing, claims management, and patient engagement. Real-time eligibility verification. Clinical-first design for independent practices.
technology: Cloud EHR, billing integration, eligibility APIs
target_customer: Independent primary care practices, direct primary care
varden_fit: MEDIUM — Elation proves primary care-focused EHR with billing integration works. European primary care needs similar tools.
notes: CONTRARIAN: Primary care EHR is crowded but essential. Billing and eligibility integration is key differentiator.
